ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes for the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie's director */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie's writer */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie's producer */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Box office revenue of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username selected by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of user registration */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is an admin */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was submitted */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the movie in their watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie added to the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  "is_watched" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has watched the movie */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date the user watched the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Drama) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for admin authentication */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Admin's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Admin's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Admin's date of birth */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the admin's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the admin's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the platform */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, rate, review) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
